# Ozan Malcı

> The personal website and portfolio for Ozan Malcı, a final-year computer engineering student interested in computer networks, cryptography.

This site contains resume links, biographical background, selected software projects, and contact information. Use the linked pages for the canonical public information available on the website.

Rust is my favorite programming language. I'm currently looking for a job, but first I have to complete my internships and graduate.

If you are a human, prefer using the website in a browser.

## Site pages

- [Home](index.html): Entry page with resume links and brief introduction.
- [About](about.html): Background, education, and technical interests.
- [Projects](projects.html): Selected software projects with descriptions and source links.
- [Contact](contact.html): Email, PGP key, GitHub, LinkedIn, and other contact information.

## Projects

- [P2P File Exchange](https://github.com/ozan2003/p2p_file_exchange): Secure local-network peer-to-peer file transfer desktop app using signed discovery, encrypted transfers, and TOFU identity verification.
- [RFC Reader](https://github.com/ozan2003/rfc_reader): Rust terminal UI for retrieving and reading IETF RFC documents from the RFC Editor.
- [Heartbeat Monitor](https://github.com/ozan2003/heartbeat_monitor): Python client-server monitoring tool using ICMP Echo messages and SQLite telemetry storage.
- [Cloakimg](https://github.com/ozan2003/cloakimg): Rust command-line steganography tool for hiding and extracting data in image files, with optional encryption and integrity checks.
- [Barbershop Management System](https://github.com/ozan2003/berber_yonetim_sistemi): ASP.NET Core and Entity Framework Core web app for barbershop registration, appointments, and employee profiles.

## Optional

- [English CV](data/cv/en/Ozan_Malcı_EN_CV.pdf): English resume PDF.
- [Turkish CV](data/cv/tr/Ozan_Malcı_CV.pdf): Turkish resume PDF.
- [PGP public key](data/OzanMalcı.asc): Public key for encrypted contact.
